test_cases.title: Registration with a duplicate email shows a clear error message
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is shown indicating the email is already in use; registration does not proceed

test_cases.title: Duplicate-email registration does not modify the existing account
preconditions: An account with 'user@example.com' exists with a known password
steps: Attempt to register with 'user@example.com' and a different password
Log in using the original credentials
test_cases.expected_result: The existing account is not modified; the original user can still log in with their original password

notes: Two test cases address the two explicit outcomes: the clear error text and the guarantee that the existing account is not modified.
